ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (1-24) */,
  "pge_kwh" REAL /* Energy consumption in kWh by Pacific Gas and Electric */,
  "sce_kwh" REAL /* Energy consumption in kWh by Southern California Edison */,
  "sdge_kwh" REAL /* Energy consumption in kWh by San Diego Gas & Electric */,
  "vea_kwh" REAL /* Energy consumption in kWh by Valley Electric Association */,
  "total_kwh" REAL /* Total energy consumption in kWh */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source for the consumption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utility_companies" (
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utility company */,
  "utility_name" TEXT /* Name of the utility company */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the utility company */,
  "service_area" TEXT /* Service area of the utility company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the utility company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grid performance entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance measurement */,
  "peak_demand" REAL /* Peak demand measured in kW */,
  "avg_consumption" REAL /* Average consumption measured in kW */,
  "caiso_data" REAL /* CAISO grid performance value */,
  "renewable_generation" REAL /* Renewable energy generation in kWh */,
  "non_renewable_generation" REAL /* Non-renewable energy generation in kWh */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (analyst, administrator, utility representative) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view report, download data) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source (e.g., Solar, Wind) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of energy source (Renewable, Non-Renewable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "emission_rate" REAL /* Emission rate of the energy source in kg CO2/kWh */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demand_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demand forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the utility company for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecasted_demand" REAL /* Forecasted demand in kW */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the forecast as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demand_forecasts_utility_id FOREIGN KEY ("utility_id") REFERENCES utility_companies ("utility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the utility company related to the cost */,
  "cost_per_kwh" REAL /* Cost per kWh of energy */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the cost entry */,
  "rate_type" TEXT /* Type of rate (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_costs_utility_id FOREIGN KEY ("utility_id") REFERENCES utility_companies ("utility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supply_data" (
  "supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the supply measurement */,
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the utility company */,
  "renewable_supply" REAL /* Renewable energy supply in kWh */,
  "non_renewable_supply" REAL /* Non-renewable energy supply in kWh */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total energy supply in kWh */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supply_data_utility_id FOREIGN KEY ("utility_id") REFERENCES utility_companies ("utility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high demand, low supply) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user notified about the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, acknowledged, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather measurement */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_storage" (
  "storage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy storage entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the storage measurement */,
  "storage_capacity" REAL /* Storage capacity in kWh */,
  "charged_energy" REAL /* Charged energy in kWh */,
  "discharged_energy" REAL /* Discharged energy in kWh */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_id")
)
